subject: FW: FW- Privileged and Confidential[1]
body:
Virginia had a prior assault and battery – bellow is the conclusion

[cid:067EF5B3-ED19-47C2-9707-2C3E890442B3]

Virginia’s mother refs her drug use and possible involvement in witchcraft  - there are other refs to her drug/witchcraft and drinking problems

[cid:60197F48-27C6-4E5D-9308-E9C8765ADA0C]

Virginia was arrested in 2002 for theft and left the US with an outstanding arrest warrant

Just an FYI – another very important point that is missing in all of this is that Brad Edwards, Virginia’s ‘lawyer’, was Rothstein’s partner – Rothstein was sent to jail for 50 years for selling fake suits in JE case..
